---
title: "another exercise"
author: "..."
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(tidyverse.quiet = TRUE)
```




## Intro Thoughts


## Status Quo

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

```

## Experiment

```{r}

```



## Closing remarks, Other Relevant Work, Caveats
